opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like I'm swallowing ground glass, and I haven't been able to drink a single drop of water all day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My throat has got so painful over the last day that I can't swallow anything, not even water, and I'm starting to feel really weak and run down.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 2 days ago with mild aches, watery irritated eyes and a runny nose
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 48 hours, but much worse in the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.character: began as a cold with sniffles and a cough, then the throat pain became severe — it now feels raw and sharp, like swallowing broken glass
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the throat pain is severe, bad enough that I can't make myself swallow liquids
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mainly the throat, with a cough and a blocked, runny nose
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and steadily worsening since it began
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much has helped so far
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: swallowing anything, even water or my own saliva
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: runny nose, cough, watery/irritated eyes, feeling feverish, and general tiredness and weakness
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get sore throats with colds sometimes but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm exhausted and the pain is stopping me drinking; I'm managing on my own at home

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no one else at home to help, worried about coping if I can't keep fluids down

objective_data_offered.value: I feel feverish and it read 37.8 on my home thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer, not clinically calibrated

objective_data_offered.value: my lips and mouth look really dry and I look tired and washed out on camera
I haven't been able to drink any water all day and I feel weak and a bit light-headed
I can still open my mouth normally, I'm not drooling and my voice sounds normal
